emails.body: Re Millenium: Electric Gas system Precedent Cost Reimbursement Agreement FYI, have you handled any of this before? Carlos Sole' Senior Counsel Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street Houston, Texas 77002-7361 (713) 345-8191 (phone) 713 646-3393 (fax) Forwarded by Carlos Sole/NA/Enron on 04/24/2001 09:42 AM Rick Whitaker Sent by: Rick Whitaker 04/24/2001 09:24 AM
